verses.text: As He leaves the temple, the disciples admire its stones; 'there shall not be left here one stone upon another.' Coming ruin. The proud temple will be utterly thrown down.
As He leaves the temple, the disciples admire its stones; 'there shall not be left here one stone upon another.' Coming ruin. The proud temple will be utterly thrown down.
Asked of the end, He warns, 'Take heed that no man deceive you'; many shall come in His name. First, beware. The peril of the last days is deception.
Asked of the end, He warns, 'Take heed that no man deceive you'; many shall come in His name. First, beware. The peril of the last days is deception.
Asked of the end, He warns, 'Take heed that no man deceive you'; many shall come in His name. First, beware. The peril of the last days is deception.
Wars, famines, and earthquakes shall come — 'the beginning of sorrows.' Birth pangs. Such troubles are signs, not yet the end.
Wars, famines, and earthquakes shall come — 'the beginning of sorrows.' Birth pangs. Such troubles are signs, not yet the end.
Wars, famines, and earthquakes shall come — 'the beginning of sorrows.' Birth pangs. Such troubles are signs, not yet the end.
His own shall be hated and many offended; 'because iniquity shall abound, the love of many shall wax cold.' Cooling love. Hard times test and chill the love of many.
His own shall be hated and many offended; 'because iniquity shall abound, the love of many shall wax cold.' Cooling love. Hard times test and chill the love of many.
His own shall be hated and many offended; 'because iniquity shall abound, the love of many shall wax cold.' Cooling love. Hard times test and chill the love of many.
His own shall be hated and many offended; 'because iniquity shall abound, the love of many shall wax cold.' Cooling love. Hard times test and chill the love of many.
'He that shall endure unto the end... shall be saved'; the gospel shall be preached to all nations, then the end. Endurance and witness. The faithful hold on while the gospel runs its course.
'He that shall endure unto the end... shall be saved'; the gospel shall be preached to all nations, then the end. Endurance and witness. The faithful hold on while the gospel runs its course.
When the abomination of desolation appears, let those in Judea flee at once without delay. Swift escape. Heed the warning and do not linger in the doomed place.
When the abomination of desolation appears, let those in Judea flee at once without delay. Swift escape. Heed the warning and do not linger in the doomed place.
When the abomination of desolation appears, let those in Judea flee at once without delay. Swift escape. Heed the warning and do not linger in the doomed place.
When the abomination of desolation appears, let those in Judea flee at once without delay. Swift escape. Heed the warning and do not linger in the doomed place.
Woe to nursing mothers; pray your flight be not in winter; for the elect's sake those days are shortened. Tempered trial. God limits the tribulation for His chosen.
Woe to nursing mothers; pray your flight be not in winter; for the elect's sake those days are shortened. Tempered trial. God limits the tribulation for His chosen.
Woe to nursing mothers; pray your flight be not in winter; for the elect's sake those days are shortened. Tempered trial. God limits the tribulation for His chosen.
Woe to nursing mothers; pray your flight be not in winter; for the elect's sake those days are shortened. Tempered trial. God limits the tribulation for His chosen.
Believe not those who cry, Here is Christ; false christs shall deceive, if possible, the very elect. Beware false hopes. The deceivers of the last days are subtle and many.
Believe not those who cry, Here is Christ; false christs shall deceive, if possible, the very elect. Beware false hopes. The deceivers of the last days are subtle and many.
Believe not those who cry, Here is Christ; false christs shall deceive, if possible, the very elect. Beware false hopes. The deceivers of the last days are subtle and many.
Believe not those who cry, Here is Christ; false christs shall deceive, if possible, the very elect. Beware false hopes. The deceivers of the last days are subtle and many.
As lightning shines from east to west, 'so shall... the coming of the Son of man be.' Unmistakable. His coming will be sudden, visible, and beyond all doubt.
As lightning shines from east to west, 'so shall... the coming of the Son of man be.' Unmistakable. His coming will be sudden, visible, and beyond all doubt.
After the tribulation the heavens shake; the Son of man appears, and His angels gather the elect from the four winds. Glorious return. The Judge comes openly to gather His own.
After the tribulation the heavens shake; the Son of man appears, and His angels gather the elect from the four winds. Glorious return. The Judge comes openly to gather His own.
After the tribulation the heavens shake; the Son of man appears, and His angels gather the elect from the four winds. Glorious return. The Judge comes openly to gather His own.
Learn from the fig tree; when these signs appear, it is near; 'heaven and earth shall pass away, but my words shall not.' Sure word. All else perishes, but Christ's word stands for ever.
Learn from the fig tree; when these signs appear, it is near; 'heaven and earth shall pass away, but my words shall not.' Sure word. All else perishes, but Christ's word stands for ever.
Learn from the fig tree; when these signs appear, it is near; 'heaven and earth shall pass away, but my words shall not.' Sure word. All else perishes, but Christ's word stands for ever.
Learn from the fig tree; when these signs appear, it is near; 'heaven and earth shall pass away, but my words shall not.' Sure word. All else perishes, but Christ's word stands for ever.
Of that day knows no man but the Father; as in Noah's days, men ate and drank till the flood came. Unawares. The end will find the careless world unprepared.
Of that day knows no man but the Father; as in Noah's days, men ate and drank till the flood came. Unawares. The end will find the careless world unprepared.
Of that day knows no man but the Father; as in Noah's days, men ate and drank till the flood came. Unawares. The end will find the careless world unprepared.
Of that day knows no man but the Father; as in Noah's days, men ate and drank till the flood came. Unawares. The end will find the careless world unprepared.
Two in the field, one taken, one left; 'Watch therefore: for ye know not what hour your Lord doth come.' Stay ready. The uncertain hour calls for constant watchfulness.
Two in the field, one taken, one left; 'Watch therefore: for ye know not what hour your Lord doth come.' Stay ready. The uncertain hour calls for constant watchfulness.
Two in the field, one taken, one left; 'Watch therefore: for ye know not what hour your Lord doth come.' Stay ready. The uncertain hour calls for constant watchfulness.
Had the goodman known the thief's hour, he would have watched; 'be ye also ready.' Constant readiness. The coming is sure, the time unknown, so we must always be prepared.
Had the goodman known the thief's hour, he would have watched; 'be ye also ready.' Constant readiness. The coming is sure, the time unknown, so we must always be prepared.
Blessed the faithful servant whom his lord finds at his work; he is made ruler over all. Reward of faithfulness. The diligent servant is honoured at his master's return.
Blessed the faithful servant whom his lord finds at his work; he is made ruler over all. Reward of faithfulness. The diligent servant is honoured at his master's return.
Blessed the faithful servant whom his lord finds at his work; he is made ruler over all. Reward of faithfulness. The diligent servant is honoured at his master's return.
But the evil servant who says, 'My lord delayeth,' and beats his fellows, shall be cut off with the hypocrites. False security. To presume on delay invites a sudden judgment.
But the evil servant who says, 'My lord delayeth,' and beats his fellows, shall be cut off with the hypocrites. False security. To presume on delay invites a sudden judgment.
